login.title: Login
login.socialOnlyMessage: Get started easily with your social account
login.termsNotice: By logging in, you agree to our {{terms}} and {{privacy}}.

errors.googleFailed: An error occurred during Google login.
errors.appleFailed: An error occurred during Apple login.
errors.instagramFailed: An error occurred during Instagram login.
errors.facebookFailed: An error occurred during Instagram login.
errors.OAuthSignin: Failed to connect to social login provider.
errors.OAuthAccountNotLinked: This email is already registered with another method. Please login with that method.
errors.Default: An error occurred during login. Please try again.

register.title: Sign Up
register.subtitle: Get started easily with your social account
register.termsNotice: By signing up, you agree to our {{terms}} and {{privacy}}.
register.successToastMessage: Welcome! You can now log in.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.googleFailed: An error occurred during Google sign up.
errors.appleFailed: An error occurred during Apple sign up.
errors.instagramFailed: An error occurred during Instagram sign up.
errors.facebookFailed: An error occurred during Instagram sign up.
errors.OAuthSignin: Failed to connect to social login provider.
errors.OAuthAccountNotLinked: This email is already registered with another method. Please login with that method.
errors.Default: An error occurred. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.success: Password reset email has been sent. Please check your email.

errors.requestFailed: An error occurred while requesting password reset.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.newPasswordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters and contain letters and numbers.
resetPassword.successMessage: Please login with your new password.
resetPassword.requestNewLink: Request a new password reset link

errors.invalidToken: Invalid link. Please request a new password reset link.
errors.resetFailed: An error occurred while resetting password.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
